description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-dialog

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-dialog/`

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE FOR SCORING
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `validate_usage`, `list_css_parts`, `list_events`, `list_slots`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report any wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Overlay, surface, header, footer, border-radius. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. dialog role. aria-modal. Focus trap. Return focus on close. Escape to dismiss. aria-labelledby/describedby.
3. **Functionality** — Open/close. Modal vs non-modal. Overlay click dismiss. Header/body/footer slots. Scroll behavior (body lock). Nested dialogs. Animation.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. CSS Parts. Overlay. Centered positioning. Responsive (full-screen on mobile). Z-index management.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — All API documented.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Focus trap. Escape. Overlay click. Scroll lock. ARIA.
8. **Storybook** — Basic. Scrolling content. Form inside. Nested. Sizes.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — AJAX dialog replacement. Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-dialog
